release_output_mapping.client_projection_effect: visible with clientSummary only; internal draft/rationale/compliance notes hidden

client_projection_contract.proof: recommendation-review-workflow API release test asserts visible projection payload equals clientSummary and forbidden fields are absent.

audit_requirements: Every block/release/request evidence outcome must write actor role, target, previous/next state, result and reason.
Release denied must still write denial audit with missing preconditions.
Audit persistence failure is fail-closed and must leave no client release.
Decision linkage after release must be metadata-only until release succeeds, then released_to_client.

source_evidence.role: Verifies release side effects, client projection payload, audit metadata, block audit and request evidence state.
Verifies journey command release denial, advisor-only fail-closed path and successful compliance release.
Writes release, block, evidence request, audit and client projection side effects.
Projects client-safe payload without internal fields.

commands_run.command: pnpm playwright test tests/journey-api.spec.ts -g "runs MJ-001 through explicit evidence" --workers=1
commands_run.result: 1 passed after initial transient scope-denied suite result

commands_run.command: pnpm playwright test tests/p44-phase7-certification.spec.ts tests/scf-p04-p06-flow-ui.spec.ts tests/release-spine-command-surface.spec.ts tests/recommendation-review-workflow-api.spec.ts tests/journey-api.spec.ts --workers=1

validation.positive_acceptance_result: Successful compliance release updates recommendation, compliance review, decision, selected evidence and client-safe projection.
validation.negative_acceptance_result: Denied release, request evidence, block, advisor-only, missing payload and audit-unavailable paths remain fail-closed.

bold_cleanup_recommendations: Make release audit mapping generated from the same typed action registry that drives the decision-room controls.
Promote release_denied audit cases to first-class acceptance artifacts instead of treating them as test internals.
Forbid release success messaging unless a persisted audit id and reloaded released state are present.
